blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,152 ft. Looking ahead, 38 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 17" of heavy snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 9°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 8°F. Expect powder.
